message:
refactor(discovery): require explicit manifest declarations, remove inference

Shift offline manifest discovery from inferential to declarative metadata.
Connectors must now explicitly declare capabilities instead of relying on
auto-normalization heuristics.

Removed inference logic:
- Archetype normalization (messaging→bidirectional conversion)
- manifest_declares_streaming() and streaming auto-injection
- Auto-injection of requires_approval default
- Rate_limits section auto-removal
- Disable supports_simulate for offline manifests (cannot prove capability
  without live host verification)

Updated audit defaults:
- approval_declared_where_needed and has_rate_limits now default to false
  unless explicitly declared in manifest

This aligns with the host-first truthful runtime migration: offline
metadata should not fabricate capabilities that can only be verified live.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
